query: SELECT item_key, name, item_type, sub_type, rarity FROM game_inventory_items WHERE item_key LIKE 'food-%' OR item_key LIKE 'forge-%' OR item_key LIKE 'equip-%' ORDER BY item_type, item_key LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT item_key, name, item_type, sub_type, rarity FROM game_inventory_items WHERE item_key LIKE 'food-%' OR item_key LIKE 'forge-%' OR item_key LIKE 'equip-%' ORDER BY item_type, item_key LIMIT 20;
